verification_gate: Owner (David / Governance Board) records a bounded decision resolving POSTV0-Q2 with an explicit unblock condition, a deferral-or-rollback rule, and the current default preserved until unblocked.

gate_result.question: POSTV0-Q2
gate_result.decision: Hermes is out of v0. Which orchestration primitives become first-class task-graph edges is deferred to a post-v0 RFC.
gate_result.unblock_condition: A post-v0 RFC mapping specific Hermes primitives to task-graph edge types with owner sign-off.
gate_result.deferral_rollback_rule: Hermes primitives are excluded from the v0 task-graph edge model.

proof_summary: DECIDE-005 records the owner-ratified bounded decision for POSTV0-Q2 (Hermes primitives as task-graph edges): Hermes is out of v0. Which orchestration primitives become first-class task-graph edges is deferred to a post-v0 RFC. Unblock condition and deferral/rollback rule are recorded in 09_OPEN_QUESTIONS.md. The v0 default is preserved until an explicit unblock RFC with owner sign-off. No product execution performed.
